observations.note: ADR-022 follows complete template with context, decision, rationale, consequences, and references. All 3 loading mechanism alternatives documented with clear pros/cons.
EPIC-082 updated with explicit DECISION marker (not just recommendation) and Implementation Guidance section with clear per-feature requirements and ADR-022 reference.
Test suite: 17/17 assertions passing across 3 AC test files. Tests follow AAA pattern (Arrange-Act-Assert) with zero gaming violations. All tests deterministic and non-flaky.
100% standards compliance: coding-standards.md (direct instructions, no prose), anti-patterns.md (no Bash for file ops), source-tree.md (correct file locations), tech-stack.md (Markdown format).
Architecture compliance: ADR decision (Approach A: orchestration-driven) aligns with SRP from architecture-constraints.md. Subagent core files remain unmodified (SC-4 success metric preserved).
Story demonstrates strong traceability: AC definitions → test cases (5-7 assertions per AC). All implementation notes mapped to specific deliverables with line number references.
